case_title: HUAN QUAN YU VS. MAELLE MARIE OLIVOLA ET AL

docket_entries.description: DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE (TRANSACTION ID # 60942007)
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF JUN-21-2017 CONTINUED TO AUG-02-2017 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF SEP-12-2017 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF YU, HUAN QUAN AS TO DEFENDANT OLIVOLA, MAELLE MARIE ISREAL, ARUN ANTONY DOES 1 TO 25 INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR JUN-21-2017 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  MAR-21-2017 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         MAY-30-2017

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR SEP-12-2017 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE AUG-02-2017 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
